actionUnits.condition: Object has BoxCollider (IsTrigger=0) so Trigger is allowed. Scene attaches two MonoBehaviours: SteamAudioSource (MonoBehaviour_0 id=112451389, guid=59c3684b22f00604a97bb68037fcf4cd) configured with distanceAttenuation=1 (PhysicsBased), airAbsorption=1; and FireBasedAudioManager (MonoBehaviour_1 id=112451392, guid=77f9a59041a2de446bf7704b5c31f103) with fireLimit=10 and timeInterval=25. FireBasedAudioManager sets shouldPlay=true on Awake, so its Update will auto-play AudioSource every 25s. This Trigger includes a no-arg public call on SteamAudioSource and waits >25s to allow automatic playback to occur.
